creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm closing this one for several reasons: 

1. It's old. ;) 

2. I cannot find the updated driver in freefall's incoming directory, 
as noted.  Someone must have nuked it. 

3. I cannot find any refernce to the GPIB driver in our docs, and I've 
checked the installation guides, the kernel configuration files and 
the Handbook.  If Fred can give me any better indiciation of where he 
saw the incorrect docs, it would help.  If the new driver could be 
uploaded again, that would be good too. 

Thanks!
